tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List projects accessible with the current credentials.

tools.name: run_vrt
tools.description: Run VRT comparison against baselines.

tools.description: Capture new VRT baselines.

tools.name: run_perf
tools.description: Run performance Lighthouse audit.

tools.name: run_seo
tools.description: Run SEO audit.

tools.name: run_tracking
tools.description: Run analytics/tracking audit. Dispatches linked FRT features by featureId; audits each event on its linked stepIndex (network hits during that step only). Events need frtRefs with stepIndex — call tracking_get_plan first.

tools.name: run_a11y
tools.description: Run accessibility audit.

tools.name: run_security
tools.description: Run security scan.

tools.name: run_frt
tools.description: Run FRT functional test batch (all features or featureIds subset).

tools.name: run_full_audit
tools.description: Run full multi-pillar audit (async job).

tools.name: get_run_status
tools.description: Get run status and summary.

tools.name: wait_for_run
tools.description: Poll until run completes.

tools.name: list_scenarios
tools.description: List VRT scenarios for the project.

project.description: Project slug or id (optional with API key)

tools.name: get_run_failures
tools.description: Failed scenarios with mismatch % from a VRT run.

project.description: Project slug or id (optional with API key)

tools.name: explain_vrt_failure
tools.description: Structured VRT failure analysis.

project.description: Project slug or id (optional with API key)

tools.name: approve_vrt_results
tools.description: Approve failed VRT results as baselines.

project.description: Project slug or id (optional with API key)

confirm.description: Must be true for mutating tools

tools.description: Post VisualQ summary on a GitHub PR.

project.description: Project slug or id (optional with API key)

tools.name: get_site_health
tools.description: Rolling site health with coverage and pillar rollups.

project.description: Project slug or id (optional with API key)

tools.name: get_page_health
tools.description: Rolling health for one page/scenario.

project.description: Project slug or id (optional with API key)

tools.name: get_run_report
tools.description: Slim VRT run report with signed image URLs.

project.description: Project slug or id (optional with API key)

tools.name: tracking_get_plan
tools.description: Tracking plan with event↔FRT links. Each event uses frtRefs: [{ featureId, stepIndex, stepText }] — one FRT feature = one scenario; stepIndex is required (0-based, no Background). Response includes eventFrtLinking hints and feature step counts. Legacy scenarioName refs are invalid.

project.description: Project slug or id (optional with API key)

tools.name: tracking_get_audit_report
tools.description: Tracking audit bilan (global score, suite table). FRT-verified events include frt.featureId + frt.stepIndex on eventResults — match plan links by featureId, not scenario name. Per-step audit: hits captured during the linked step only.

project.description: Project slug or id (optional with API key)

auditId.description: Tracking audit id (defaults to latest for project/environment)

tools.name: tracking_export_audit_report
tools.description: Export tracking audit report as xlsx, html, or pdf (base64 file payload). Uses latest audit when auditId is omitted.

project.description: Project slug or id (optional with API key)

auditId.description: Tracking audit id (defaults to latest for project/environment)

tools.name: tracking_get_page
tools.description: Tracking plan page with datalayer attributes and linked VRT scenarios (pageIds).

project.description: Project slug or id (optional with API key)

tools.name: tracking_get_event
tools.description: Tracking plan event with event-variable attributes and linked FRT scenarios (frtRefs).

project.description: Project slug or id (optional with API key)

eventId.description: Analytics event id or column key (e.g. click.action::2)

tools.name: tracking_list_pages
tools.description: List tracking plan pages with scenario and attribute counts.

project.description: Project slug or id (optional with API key)

tools.name: tracking_list_events
tools.description: List tracking plan events with FRT link and attribute counts; flags uncovered events.

project.description: Project slug or id (optional with API key)

tools.name: tracking_list_page_attributes
tools.description: List datalayer variable definitions and per-page expected values. Filter by pageId to scope values.

tools.name: tracking_list_event_attributes
tools.description: List event-variable definitions and per-event expected values. Filter by eventId to scope values.

project.description: Project slug or id (optional with API key)

tools.description: Set or update a datalayer attribute expected value on a plan page. Requires confirm: true.

tools.description: Remove a datalayer attribute value from a plan page (drops row if unused). Requires confirm: true.

tools.name: run_frt_feature
tools.description: Run an FRT feature (one feature = one Gherkin scenario). For tracking event verification use featureId only — omit scenarioFilter. scenarioFilter is only for legacy multi-scenario .feature files.

project.description: Project slug or id (optional with API key)

scenarioFilter.description: Optional — rarely needed; one VisualQ feature already equals one scenario

confirm.description: Must be true for mutating tools

tools.name: frt_organize_feature_groups
tools.description: Organize FRT features into folders on the FRT scenarios page. Use exact feature names from frt_get_feature_groups.

project.description: Project slug or id (optional with API key)

groups.description: Folders to create/update, in display order.

featureNames.description: Exact FRT feature names to place in this folder

replaceExistingGroups.description: When true (default), only listed folders are kept.

confirm.description: Must be true for mutating tools
